allow: Bash(cat "E:/Local-server/scripts/009_device_sync_alignment.sql" | docker exec -i cfarm-db psql -U cfarm -d cfarm_local 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import asyncio
import asyncpg

async def check\(\):
    conn = await asyncpg.connect\(
        host='localhost', port=5432, user='cfarm',
        password='cfarm_local_2026', database='cfarm_local'
    \)
    
    devices = await conn.fetch\('SELECT id, device_code, firmware_id FROM devices LIMIT 5'\)
    print\('All devices:'\)
    for d in devices:
        print\(f'  id={d[\\"id\\"]}, code={d[\\"device_code\\"]}, firmware_id={d[\\"firmware_id\\"]}'\)
    
    firmwares = await conn.fetch\('SELECT id, device_type_code, version FROM firmwares LIMIT 5'\)
    print\('Firmwares:'\)
    for f in firmwares:
        print\(f'  id={f[\\"id\\"]}, type={f[\\"device_type_code\\"]}, version={f[\\"version\\"]}'\)
    
    await conn.close\(\)

asyncio.run\(check\(\)\)
")
